title: chomelia subsessilis
intro: Chomelia subsessilis is a plant species, also known as Strychnopoga subessilis, in the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chomelia subsessilis include its ability to aid in the management of various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. Chomelia subsessilis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
